title: SemantAH chunk embedding bridge
goal: Prototype a bounded semantic retrieval bridge where SemantAH embeds stable RepoBrief chunk_index records externally and RepoBrief consumes only measured, citation-preserving semantic evidence for evaluation, not default core ranking.

acceptance.assertion: Semantic inputs are stable chunk ids/ranges with hashes, not free-form repo crawls.
Embeddings and semantic ranking remain outside RepoBrief core unless a later measured promotion decision allows bounded consumption.
Recall/MRR and miss-taxonomy changes are measured against existing retrieval baselines before any default use.

metadata.source_vision: SemantAH over RepoBrief chunks, not embeddings in the RepoBrief core.
metadata.dependency_note: SemantAH usefulness initiative exists, but no SEMANTAH-USEFULNESS-V1-T001 task is present on Bureau origin/main at reconciliation time; this task therefore depends only on RepoBrief prerequisites and the registered repo.semantah resource.
